description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow enclosed by a matching brick perimeter wall, featuring a spacious front yard with green grass and a few shrubs and trees. The front facade has a covered porch supported by white columns, leading to a main entrance door flanked by two windows. The roof is a complex gable style with multiple intersecting sections, finished in dark gray shingles. The rear and side facades have fewer windows, with the back wall being mostly solid except for a couple of small windows. A flagpole with an Italian flag is present in the yard, adding a touch of character to the property.
description: A brick bungalow with a gabled roof, covered front porch, and enclosed grassy yard with shrubs and an Italian flag.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, two front windows, and the grassy yard enclosed by a brick wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the intersecting gable roof, brick wall enclosure, and a portion of the yard with shrubs and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow with tall windows, arched porch openings, and the brick wall enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the yard, flagpole, and the side of the bungalow with minimal windows and the complex roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with tall grouped windows on the rear facade
